critical_issues.title: Extreme Kitchen Delay - 20,021 Minutes for Single Order
critical_issues.root_cause: Order 69847f2bfeda358072c22b2f took 333.7 hours (13.9 days) from order to completion, indicating a system failure, order forgotten, or process breakdown
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement automated kitchen alerts for orders exceeding 60 minutes, conduct immediate investigation into this specific incident, train staff on order tracking, and establish maximum kitchen time thresholds with escalation protocols

critical_issues.title: High Volume of Incomplete Orders
critical_issues.root_cause: 60% of orders (3 out of 5) remain uncompleted with status 'in_progress' or 'sent_to_kitchen', representing ₹168,000 in pending revenue
critical_issues.recommendation: Audit order completion workflow, ensure staff close orders promptly after service, implement end-of-shift reconciliation to complete all served orders, and review kitchen-to-billing handoff process

critical_issues.title: All Inventory Items Expired (Past Expiry Date)
critical_issues.root_cause: 100% of inventory shows negative days_to_expiry (ranging from -194 to -371 days), indicating either system date error or complete inventory spoilage
critical_issues.impact: ₹68,695 total inventory at risk if actually expired
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately verify system date settings and expiry date calculations. If dates are correct, conduct full inventory audit, dispose of expired items per food safety regulations, and implement FIFO rotation with weekly expiry checks

critical_issues.title: Critically Low Stock Levels Across Multiple Items
critical_issues.root_cause: Multiple items below reorder levels: Bhut Jolokia Oil (2/8, 25% of max), Arugula (5/20, 25%), Cheesecake Base Mix (5/20, 25%), indicating poor inventory monitoring
critical_issues.impact: Potential stockouts leading to menu item unavailability
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement automated reorder triggers when stock hits reorder level, conduct daily stock checks for perishables, establish vendor relationships for emergency restocking, and increase par levels for high-demand items

critical_issues.title: Extremely Low Transaction Volume
critical_issues.root_cause: Only 5 orders recorded over 31-day period (0.16 orders/day), indicating either new restaurant, data collection issues, or severe operational problems
critical_issues.impact: ₹210,000 total revenue for month is unsustainable
critical_issues.recommendation: If restaurant is operational: investigate why orders aren't being recorded in system, verify POS integration, check if staff are bypassing system. If newly opened: accelerate marketing efforts, offer launch promotions, and increase customer acquisition activities

critical_issues.title: First Order Excessive Kitchen Time (167.85 Minutes)
critical_issues.root_cause: Order 6974a0e2d2f2cef5982be03b took 2.8 hours to complete for single item order, indicating inefficiency or complexity issues
critical_issues.impact: Poor customer experience, reduced table turnover
critical_issues.recommendation: Analyze kitchen workflow for bottlenecks, ensure adequate staffing during peak hours, simplify complex menu items, and set target kitchen times by dish type (appetizers: 15 mins, mains: 25 mins)

critical_issues.title: Overstock of Low-Turnover Items
critical_issues.root_cause: Truffle Oil at 20% capacity (800/4000), Cooking Oil at 25% (25/100) suggests over-ordering or excessive par levels for actual demand
critical_issues.recommendation: Review historical usage rates and adjust max_stock levels to match actual consumption patterns, reduce reorder quantities for slow-moving items, and negotiate smaller batch orders with suppliers
